notes: Grindare Studio intro replaces the Godot boot logo (geometric neon, 'WHERE GRIND NEVER ENDS' tagline, click-to-skip). Profile sidebar avatar now uses the same chevron ship as the skill tree + in-match player so all three match. Launcher 0.1.10 has reliable Windows self-update + always-visible safety-net link to pulsewavegame.com.
launcher_notes: Always-visible safety-net footer link to pulsewavegame.com so users have a one-click escape hatch if self-update ever breaks. Reliable Windows self-update (copy+del, Defender-friendly) carried forward from v0.1.9 with verbose log at %TEMP%\pulsewave_launcher_update.log.
